message:
test(unit): expand kd_tree.rs inline tests from 16 to 46 (+30) (ft-v3965)

Cover edge cases: empty/single-point trees, zero radius, 1D/5D trees,
boundary inclusion for range/radius, k-nearest sort order, brute-force
correctness checks on 10x10 grid, negative coordinates, VecPoint
constructors, serde roundtrip query preservation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
